{{CargoRelic
|name=Artemis and the Stag
|class_id=22802
|rank=SS
|affct=ART
|source=
|description= Artemis and the Stag is an ancient Roman bronze sculpture created in the 1st century BCE, depicting the goddess Artemis in hunting attire with a stag beside her, symbolizing her role as the protector of hunting and wildlife. This sculpture stands one meter tall and is almost perfectly preserved, making it a rare masterpiece of the classical era. The sculpture is not only acclaimed for its artistic value but also renowned for its performance in the auction market.
|fame=50
|art=105
|fth=67
|civ=70
|tech=55
|ss1=Snail Leadership +2<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +3<br>Per 5 purple entries completed, purple Super Species Seq. +1<br>Purple Species Map Entries: 50/50
|ss2=Snail Leadership +3<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +6<br>Per 5 purple entries completed, purple Super Species Seq. +1<br>Purple Species Map Entries: 100/100
|ss3=Snail Leadership +4<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +9<br>Per 5 purple entries completed, purple Super Species Seq. +1<br>Purple Species Map Entries: 150/150
|ss4=Snail Leadership +6<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +15<br>Per 5 purple entries completed, purple Super Species Seq. +1<br>Purple Species Map Entries: 250/250
|ss5=Snail Leadership +8<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +21<br>Per 5 purple entries completed, purple Super Species Seq. +1<br>Purple Species Map Entries: 350/350
|ss6=Snail Leadership +11<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +30<br>Per 5 purple entries completed, purple Super Species Seq. +1<br>Purple Species Map Entries: 500/500
|ss7=Snail Leadership +11<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +30<br>Per 5 purple entries completed, purple Super Species Seq. +1<br>Purple Species Map Entries: 500/500<br>Snail Leadership +5 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Surfclam skill III.png|50px]]Place in Surf Clam Biozilla: In Species War, Troop Wind DMG +60
|skill2=[[File:Biozilla skill III.png|50px]]Place in a Biozilla: In Species War, All Minion RUSH +6%
|skill3=[[File:Biozilla skill III.png|50px]]Place in a Biozilla: This Relic's ART +15
|mirage={{Mirage|name=Moon Beast|reward={{RewardIconWithLink|W-tadpole, +1000|orange}}
|3name=Moon Wolf|3rec=3.56M|3atk=46713|3defense=30804|3hp=644857|3weak=11033
|4name=Moon Deer|4rec=8.05M|4atk=73360|4defense=48377|4hp=1368427|4weak=14541
|5name=Moon Bunny|5rec=16.63M|5atk=108127|5defense=71304|5hp=2706969|5weak=18859
|Arec=39.93M|Aatk=151756|Adefense=100075|Ahp=4921471|Aweak=24988
}}}}
